_comment_1: Copy this file to _dao.env.json (sibling), then edit. _dao.env.json is excluded from VSIX by .vscodeignore (_* rule).
_comment_2: Plaintext 'Password' is intentionally NOT supported. Use one of: env var DAO_REMOTE_PASS, or PasswordFile (Export-Clixml of SecureString or PSCredential), or interactive prompt.
_comment_3: All keys are optional. Missing keys fall back to ENV vars, then to interactive prompt, then to safe defaults.
_PasswordFile_howto:
To create a DPAPI-encrypted credential file (current-user, current-machine bound):
  $cred = Get-Credential
  $cred | Export-Clixml -Path 'C:\path\to\dao-cred.xml'
Then set 'PasswordFile' to that path.

_env_vars_supported.DAO_REMOTE_PASS: Plaintext password (use only for ephemeral shells / CI)
_env_vars_supported.DAO_PROJECT_ROOT: Overrides default project root (parent of _审视/)
_env_vars_supported.DAO_REMOTE_EXT_DIR: Override remote extensions dir; if null auto-resolves to %USERPROFILE%\.windsurf\extensions
_env_vars_supported.DAO_PROXY_PORT: Local proxy port for live smoke (default 8889)
